transcript: Speaker A (AI Avatar): अरे हे काय करत आहेस? [Hey, what are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): Meditation करत होतो आणि suddenly pipe burst झाला, मी पाण्यावर floating करायला लागलो. [I was meditating and suddenly the pipe burst, I started floating on water.] Speaker A (AI Avatar): अरे तू असं म्हणू शकतोस, 'The pipe burst suddenly and I started floating on the stream of water.' [Oh, you can say it like this, 'The pipe burst suddenly and I started floating on the stream of water.'] Speaker B (Human): अरे यार, English बोलताना माझ्याकडून नेहमी असंच काहीतरी विचित्र निघतं. [Oh man, whenever I speak English, something weird like this always comes out.] Speaker A (AI Avatar): मग MySivi App try कर ना. रोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं AI teacher सोबत English बोलायची practice कर. चुकलास तरी AI teacher लगेच correct करते आणि judge पण करत नाही. आणि trial पण फक्त १ रुपयात सुरू होतं. [Then try MySivi App. Practice speaking English with an AI teacher for just 15 minutes daily. Even if you make a mistake, the AI teacher corrects you immediately and doesn't judge. And the trial starts at just 1 rupee.] Speaker B (Human): मग मी आजच download करतो. [Then I will download it today.] Speaker A (AI Avatar): बस, install button वर click कर आणि MySivi App download कर. [Just click on the install button and download MySivi App.]
on_screen_text: अरे हे काय करत [Hey, what are you doing] Meditation करत [Doing meditation] होतो आणि suddenly [was and suddenly] pipe burst झाला [pipe burst] मी पाण्यावर floating [I floating on water] The pipe burst suddenly and I started floating on the stream of water अरे यार English बोलताना माझ्याकडून नेहमी असंच काहीतरी विचित्र निघतं [Oh man, whenever I speak English, something weird like this always comes out] मग MySivi App try कर ना [Then try MySivi App] रोज फक्त 15 मिनिटं [daily only 15 minutes] MySivi Premium LIMITED TIME OFFER ₹1 Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access MySivi App download
summary: An AI avatar corrects a meditating man's broken English as he floats on a water stream. She recommends the MySivi app for daily 15-minute non-judgmental English practice. The ad highlights a 1-rupee trial offer and prompts users to install the app.
